block_02: Ride the highs and lows of the stock market with Uber CFDs.
block_04: The popular ride-hailing giant has had a shaky start since going public. Shares dropped nearly 8% and closed below the $42* mark on their first day of trading.
block_05: Though Uber’s highly anticipated IPO last week turned out to be lackluster, investors continue to watch Uber as it navigates a bumpy road.
